content: OPV is available only in multidose vials and requires freezing for long-term storage. After defrosting, the vaccine remains stable for 6 months at 2 to 8 °C. [World Health Organization. title: UMLS -- Run 0 -- Level 3 -- Community 1825
content: Immunity disorders are classified as a subset of نقص غلوبيولين الدم, which refers to a deficiency of blood globulins. This globulin deficiency results in reduced levels of immunoglobulins, compromising the body’s immune defenses and predisposing individuals to infections and other immune‑related complications. Recognizing immunity disorders within the broader context of نقص غلوبيولين الدم helps clinicians understand the underlying immunological deficit and guides appropriate diagnostic evaluation and therapeutic strategies aimed at restoring adequate immune function.
